task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for GMC Sierra (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $38300.00 and wholesale is $30400.00. Product features: Full-size pickup truck with MultiPro tailgate and premium features. Reference: https://www.gmc.com/trucks/sierra/1500

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for GMC Sierra. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying GMC Sierra. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
